features: New API v3.0-pre: simple one-line addon & plugin registration.
Interceptor system: read, edit or cancel player input & AI responses.
Async API: askAI & sendMsg return CompletableFuture, zero server lag.
Per-request model & provider override (Gemini, Claude, OpenAI).
Privacy system: opt-in anonymization, blocks addon access to private chats.
Pet API: get/set mood, bond, hunger & level programmatically.
Shared memory store for cross-addon context sharing.
Component reload: FULL / CONFIG / KNOWLEDGE / FEATURES.
Unified /aia addon command namespace with tab completion.
Security: validatePlugin() bans Bukkit plugins from API bridge.
Major RAM & CPU optimizations, ~500 lines of dead code removed.
